name: workflow run
summary: Execute a discovered workflow by ID with optional input, detached mode, and concurrency controls.

name: workflow list
summary: List all discovered local workflows in the current project.

name: workflow path
summary: Resolve a workflow ID to its entry file path.

name: workflow create
summary: Create a new workflow scaffold in .smithers/workflows or globally with --global.

name: workflow inspect
summary: Show workflow metadata, input schema, and agent-facing skill preview.

name: workflow skills
summary: Generate agent-facing skill docs for local workflows and write .md files.

name: workflow doctor
summary: Inspect workflow discovery, preload files, VCS status, and detected agents.

name: up
summary: Start a workflow execution with optional detached mode (-d), resumable run ID, and input.

name: init
summary: Install the local Smithers workflow pack into .smithers/ directory.

name: starters
summary: Show plain-English starter workflows with copy-paste commands.

name: monitor
summary: Watch, diagnose, optionally self-fix, and generate HTML report on a running workflow.

name: gateway
summary: Serve the multi-run Gateway RPC/WS control plane for workspace workflows (not tied to one run).

name: eval
summary: Run a workflow over a JSON/JSONL eval suite and write regression report.

name: optimize
summary: Run GEPA prompt optimization over an eval suite and write optimized prompt artifact.

name: supervise
summary: Watch for stale running runs and auto-resume them at configurable intervals.

name: ps
summary: List active, paused, and recently completed runs with optional --watch polling.

name: logs
summary: Tail the event log of a specific run with --follow and --tail options.

name: events
summary: Query run event history with --node filter, --type, --since, --limit, --group-by, and --watch.

name: chat
summary: Show agent chat output for the latest run or a specific run with --follow option.

name: chat-create
summary: Create and start a one-task auto-hijacked chat run with specified agent.

name: hijack
summary: Hand off latest resumable agent session or conversation for a run to interactive terminal.

name: inspect
summary: Output detailed run state including steps, agents, approvals, and outputs with optional --watch.

name: node
summary: Show enriched node details for debugging retries, tool calls, and output with watch support.

name: why
summary: Explain why a run is currently blocked, paused, or waiting with actionable next steps.

name: human
summary: List pending human requests, answer with --value, or cancel requests.

name: ask-human
summary: Raise a blocking human-approval request from inside a run and wait for decision.

name: alerts
summary: List and manage durable alert instances with actions: list, ack, resolve, silence.

name: approve
summary: Approve a paused approval gate, auto-detecting pending node if only one exists.

name: signal
summary: Deliver a durable signal to a run waiting on <Signal> or <WaitForEvent>.

name: deny
summary: Deny a paused approval gate, rejecting workflow progress.

name: cancel
summary: Safely halt agents and terminate a run.

name: down
summary: Cancel all active runs. Like 'docker compose down' for workflows.

name: graph
summary: Render the workflow graph without executing it, with optional --input and --compact.

name: snapshots
summary: List durability snapshots (workspace checkpoints) for a run.

name: restore
summary: Restore a worktree to a durability checkpoint (latest for the node, or --seq).

name: snapshot-hook
summary: Internal: PostToolUse hook that requests a Tier 1 durability snapshot.

name: revert
summary: Revert the workspace to a previous task attempt's filesystem state.

name: retry-task
summary: Retry a specific task within a run, optionally skipping dependents with --no-deps.

name: timetravel
summary: Time-travel to a previous task state by reverting filesystem and DB, optionally resuming.

name: observability
summary: Start local observability stack (Grafana, Prometheus, Tempo, OTLP) via Docker Compose.

name: ask
summary: Ask a question about Smithers using installed agent and Smithers MCP server.

name: scores
summary: View scorer results for a specific run, optionally filtered by --node.

name: replay
summary: Fork from a checkpoint and resume execution with input overrides.

name: tree
summary: Print DevTools snapshot as XML tree with optional filtering, watch, and JSON modes.

name: diff
summary: Print DiffBundle as unified diff with --stat summary and colorization options.

name: output
summary: Print node output row as JSON with optional --pretty schema-ordered rendering.

name: rewind
summary: Rewind a run to a previous frame without executing.

name: fork
summary: Create a branched run from a snapshot checkpoint with optional --run to auto-start.

name: timeline
summary: View execution timeline for a run and its forks with optional --tree recursion.

name: gui
summary: Open a directory as a workspace in Smithers GUI macOS app.

name: ui
summary: Open custom UI for a workflow run in browser, auto-starting Gateway if needed.

name: docs
summary: Print llms.txt (concise docs index for LLMs) for this CLI version.

name: docs-full
summary: Print llms-full.txt (full docs bundle for LLMs) for this CLI version.

name: usage
summary: Show rate limit and subscription quota usage for each registered account.

name: cron start
summary: Start background scheduler loop in current terminal.

name: cron add
summary: Register a new workflow cron schedule with pattern and workflow path.

name: cron list
summary: List all registered background cron schedules.

name: cron rm
summary: Delete an existing cron schedule by ID.

name: agents capabilities
summary: Print JSON report of built-in CLI agent capability registries.

name: agents doctor
summary: Validate built-in CLI agent capability registries and command-surface contracts.

name: agents add
summary: Register Smithers agent account via interactive wizard or non-interactive flags.

name: agents list
summary: List all registered Smithers agent accounts with labels and credentials status.

name: agents remove
summary: Remove a registered agent account by label.

name: memory list
summary: List all memory facts in a namespace.

name: Workflow
summary: Root container that sequences direct children and optionally caches for resume.

name: Task
summary: Executes work via agent call, computed function, or static value with schema validation.

name: Sequence
summary: Executes child tasks top-to-bottom in order.

name: Parallel
summary: Executes child tasks concurrently with optional maxConcurrency limit.

name: Branch
summary: Conditionally executes one of two branches (then/else) based on a boolean condition.

name: Loop
summary: Repeatedly renders and executes children until condition holds or maxIterations reached.

name: Approval
summary: Decision node that waits for human approval, produces typed ApprovalDecision output.

name: ApprovalGate
summary: Conditional approval gate that only requires approval when 'when' condition is true.

name: HumanTask
summary: Suspends until human submits JSON matching output schema with max validation retries.

name: Signal
summary: Typed wrapper around WaitForEvent; signal name equals node id, with typed schema.

name: WaitForEvent
summary: Durably suspends until correlated external event arrives or timeout, with timeout behavior.

name: Timer
summary: Durably suspends for relative duration (e.g. '30s') or until absolute time.

name: Worktree
summary: Runs child tasks in isolated git worktree at specified path, created and torn down automatically.

name: MergeQueue
summary: Queues child tasks so at most maxConcurrency run; defaults to 1 for single-lane merge queue.

name: Subflow
summary: Invokes child workflow with own retry, cache, and resume boundary.

name: SuperSmithers
summary: Reads and modifies source code at runtime via markdown strategy doc with agent.

name: Sandbox
summary: Runs child workflow through injectable provider with isolation, parallelism, or horizontal scale.

name: Aspects
summary: Propagates token budget and latency SLO constraints to descendant tasks.

name: TryCatchFinally
summary: Workflow-scoped error boundary with catch handlers and guaranteed cleanup via finally.

name: ContinueAsNew
summary: Closes current run and starts fresh one with optional carried state.

name: Ralph
summary: Deprecated alias for Loop component; use Loop instead.

name: ReviewLoop
summary: Produce, review, and fix in a loop until the reviewer approves.

name: Optimizer
summary: Generate, evaluate, and improve in a loop until a target score is reached.

name: ScanFixVerify
summary: Scan for problems, fix in parallel, verify, then report in a retry loop.

name: Panel
summary: Parallel specialist agents review the same input; a moderator synthesizes results.

name: Debate
summary: Adversarial multi-round debate between proposer and opponent, then judge verdict.

name: Supervisor
summary: Boss plans, workers run in parallel, boss reviews and re-delegates failures.

name: Saga
summary: Forward steps with compensations run in reverse on failure.

name: Kanban
summary: Process items through ordered columns with a pluggable ticket source.

name: EscalationChain
summary: Sequential agent escalation with optional human fallback.

name: ClassifyAndRoute
summary: Classify items into categories, then route each to a category-specific agent in parallel.

name: GatherAndSynthesize
summary: Parallel gather from multiple sources, then synthesize into a unified result.

name: CheckSuite
summary: Parallel checks with auto-aggregated pass/fail verdict.

name: DecisionTable
summary: Flat rule table that replaces nested Branch trees with declarative routing.

name: Poller
summary: Poll an external condition with configurable backoff until satisfied or timed out.

name: Runbook
summary: Sequential steps with risk classification; safe auto-runs, risky/critical gate on approval.

name: DriftDetector
summary: Capture state, compare against a baseline, and alert on meaningful drift.

name: ContentPipeline
summary: Typed waterfall of refinement stages, each depending on the previous.

name: LoopUntilScored
summary: Re-run children until the latest output's score crosses a threshold, or maxIterations is hit.

name: createScorer factory
summary: Creates a custom scorer from a configuration object with id, name, description, and score function.

name: llmJudge factory
summary: Creates an LLM-as-judge scorer that delegates evaluation to an AI agent and parses JSON responses.

name: Aggregate scorer statistics
summary: Computes aggregate statistics (count, mean, min, max, p50, stddev) for scorer results across runs.

name: Schema adherence scorer (builtin)
summary: Validates task output against Zod schema, returning 1.0 if valid or 0.0 with validation errors.

name: Latency scorer (builtin)
summary: Scores execution time with linear interpolation between a target and maximum latency threshold.

name: Relevancy scorer (builtin)
summary: LLM-based scorer that evaluates whether output addresses and is relevant to the input prompt.

name: Toxicity scorer (builtin)
summary: LLM-based scorer that detects toxic, harmful, offensive, or inappropriate content in output.

name: Faithfulness scorer (builtin)
summary: LLM-based scorer that checks output is faithful to provided context without hallucinations.

name: Scorer sampling configuration
summary: Controls how often a scorer runs: 'all', 'ratio', or 'none' types to optimize expensive evaluations.

name: Attach scorers to Task in JSX
summary: Use the scorers={} prop on Task to bind multiple named scorers with individual sampling configs.

name: Load eval cases from JSONL/JSON
summary: Loads and normalizes eval cases from JSONL or JSON files, with per-case input, expected assertions, and metadata.

name: Eval cases JSONL format
summary: Line-delimited JSON format for eval cases, each with id, input, expected (status/output/outputContains), annotations, metadata.

name: Build eval execution plan
summary: Transforms loaded cases into a planned execution with stable run IDs and suite/case metadata.

name: Evaluate case result assertions
summary: Checks run result against expected assertions (status, output, outputContains, errorContains) and returns pass/fail per assertion.

name: smithers eval CLI command
summary: Runs an eval suite: `smithers eval <workflow> --cases <file.jsonl> --suite <name> [--concurrency N] [--dry-run]`.

name: Build and write eval report
summary: Constructs and writes a JSON report summarizing eval results with per-case status, assertions, and timing.

name: smithers optimize CLI command
summary: Runs prompt optimization: baseline eval, GEPA patch generation, optimized eval, score comparison, and artifact output.

name: GEPA optimizer provider selection
summary: Choose optimizer: heuristic, cerebras, openai, anthropic, gemini, or openai-compatible with provider-specific config.

name: Optimize command with thresholds
summary: Optimize with --minImprovement, --provider, --model, --artifact, --reportDir, and concurrency options.

name: Heuristic GEPA optimizer
summary: Uses metadata.promptPatches or metadata.optimizationHints from cases to generate prompt patches without calling an LLM.

name: eval-writer skill for bootstrapping suites
summary: Workflow skill that turns plain-English acceptance criteria into executable JSONL eval fixtures with cases and rubrics.

name: Generate stable eval run IDs
summary: Creates deterministic run IDs from suite and case IDs, capping at 64 characters with hash suffix for long names.

name: Eval case metadata for optimization hints
summary: Per-case metadata object supporting promptPatches (explicit patches) and optimizationHints (guidance for GEPA).

name: Scorer execution context type
summary: Runtime context passed to scorer functions: runId, nodeId, iteration, attempt, input, output, latencyMs, outputSchema.

name: Named scorer binding with sampling
summary: Maps a named key to a Scorer and optional SamplingConfig, used in Task scorers prop.

name: Filter options for aggregateScores
summary: Options to filter aggregate statistics by runId, nodeId, or scorerId.

name: Scorer event metrics
summary: Observable metrics: scorersStarted, scorersFinished, scorersFailed, scorerDuration for monitoring scorer execution.

name: Agent fallback pools
summary: Named agent pools in .smithers/agents.ts that define fallback chains (e.g. cheapFast, smart, smartTool) for automatic agent selection and failover.

name: ClaudeCodeAgent
summary: CLI agent wrapping the Anthropic Claude Code CLI with session persistence, MCP config, tool allow/deny lists, and permission modes.

name: CodexAgent
summary: CLI agent wrapping the OpenAI Codex CLI with sandbox modes, config overrides, structured JSON output schema, and thread-based resumption.

name: OpenCodeAgent
summary: CLI agent wrapping the OpenCode CLI via opencode run --format json with session IDs, file attachments, and reasoning variants.

name: PiAgent
summary: CLI agent wrapping the Pi CLI with three modes (text/json/rpc), extension UI request callbacks, and skills/template support.

name: KimiAgent
summary: CLI agent wrapping the Moonshot Kimi CLI with automatic OAuth refresh, configurable thinking, agent selection (default/okabe), and auto-isolated KIMI_SHARE_DIR.

name: AmpAgent
summary: CLI agent wrapping the Amp CLI in --execute headless mode with thread visibility, MCP config, and dangerouslyAllowAll option.

name: GeminiAgent (deprecated)
summary: Legacy CLI agent wrapping the older Google Gemini CLI; use AntigravityAgent instead for new Google CLI integrations.

name: AntigravityAgent
summary: CLI agent wrapping the Google Antigravity CLI (agy binary) with conversation resumption, MCP config, and sandbox mode; replaces GeminiAgent.

name: ForgeAgent
summary: CLI agent wrapping the Forge CLI supporting 300+ LLM models via provider/model strings and conversation persistence.

name: VibeAgent
summary: CLI agent wrapping the Mistral Vibe CLI with streaming JSON output, session management, and tool enablement.

name: AnthropicAgent (SDK)
summary: AI SDK wrapper for Anthropic Claude models with native structured output support and tool-loop agent semantics.

name: OpenAIAgent (SDK)
summary: AI SDK wrapper for OpenAI/Azure OpenAI models with configurable baseURL/apiKey and native structured output.

name: HermesAgent (SDK)
summary: OpenAI-compatible local agent wrapper (Nous Research Hermes) using OpenAI SDK with disabled native structured output by default.

name: BaseCliAgentOptions
keyApi: id, model, systemPrompt, cwd, env, yolo, timeoutMs, idleTimeoutMs, maxOutputBytes, extraArgs
summary: Common configuration options shared by all CLI agents including timeouts, environment variables, and system prompts.

name: MCP configuration
summary: Model Context Protocol bootstrap modes (project-config, inline-config, allow-list, unsupported) vary by agent with different project/user scope support.

name: Config directory isolation
summary: Agents support configDir option to isolate credentials per invocation (CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR, CODEX_HOME, KIMI_SHARE_DIR, GEMINI_DIR).

name: Permission and approval modes
summary: Agent-specific permission handling: yolo (skip all), permissionMode flags (bypassPermissions, plan, etc.), dangerouslySkipPermissions, approvalMode, dangerouslyAllowAll.

name: Session resumption
summary: Agents persist and resume sessions via native IDs (sessionId, threadId, conversationId) passed through resumeSession or generate() options.

name: Structured output (JSON schema)
summary: CLI agents support outputSchema parameter; SDK agents support via native structured-output APIs (AnthropicAgent, OpenAIAgent) or Zod schema output.

name: Skill installation modes
summary: Agents support different skill installation: plugin (launch-time), dir (directory), files (file-based), or none; varies by agent.

name: Output format selection
summary: CLI agents support multiple output formats (text, json, stream-json) to control how progress and results are streamed and parsed.

name: Task agent routing
summary: Workflows route tasks to named agent pools from agents.ts for automatic model selection, fallback, and per-task optimization.

name: Fallback chains
summary: When a task specifies a pool of agents, Smithers automatically retries with the next agent if the current agent fails, enabling graceful degradation.

name: Hijack (interactive resume)
summary: Most CLI agents support native interactive takeover via bunx smithers-orchestrator hijack RUN_ID using vendor-specific resume flags.

name: Yolo mode
summary: yolo: true (default) auto-approves all tool calls, mapping to vendor-specific skip-permissions flags; disable for tighter control.

name: Pi extension UI requests
summary: PiAgent in RPC mode supports custom UI callbacks via onExtensionUiRequest hook for extension-based interactions.

name: Kimi OAuth auto-refresh
summary: KimiAgent automatically refreshes expired OAuth tokens using stored refresh_token; fails fast non-retryable if no token or refresh fails.

name: OpenCode nd-JSON events
summary: OpenCodeAgent parses streaming nd-JSON from opencode run with step_start/text/tool_use/step_finish/reasoning/error envelopes.

name: Codex config overrides
summary: CodexAgent config option enables inline Codex configuration via -c flags or structured key-value pairs.

name: Claude permission modes
summary: ClaudeCodeAgent supports permissionMode enum: acceptEdits, bypassPermissions, default, delegate, dontAsk, plan for fine-grained permission control.

name: AgentLike interface
summary: Common interface for all agents exposing generate() method, optional tools, and AgentCapabilityRegistry for introspection.

name: AgentCapabilityRegistry
summary: Structured capability metadata for agents including engine name, MCP bootstrap mode, skill installation mode, and built-in tool list.

name: Model selection and fallback
summary: Agents accept model option (e.g., claude-opus-4-8, gpt-5.5, gemini-3.1-pro); pools support fallback chains for automatic model selection.

name: OpenCode variant/reasoning
summary: OpenCodeAgent variant option controls reasoning effort level (high/medium/low) for different task complexity needs.

name: anthropic provider import
summary: SDK provider for AnthropicAgent allowing direct model references like anthropic('claude-opus-4').

name: openai provider import
summary: SDK provider for OpenAIAgent supporting model strings and createOpenAI() factory for custom baseURL/apiKey.

name: Agent capability diagnostics
summary: Diagnostic functions to check agent CLI availability, MCP support, skill registration, and tool surface compliance.

name: List durability snapshots
summary: List workspace checkpoints (durability snapshots) captured during a run's execution.

name: Restore worktree to checkpoint
summary: Restore a worktree to a durability checkpoint by running jj restore with the checkpoint's commit ID.

name: Rewind run to prior frame
summary: Destructively time-travel backwards by reverting VCS state and deleting frames recorded after the target frame.

name: Fork run from checkpoint
summary: Create an independent branched run from a snapshot checkpoint with optional node reset and input overrides.

name: Replay from checkpoint and resume
summary: Fork from a checkpoint and immediately resume execution, optionally restoring the VCS working copy to match the original attempt.

name: Time-travel to prior attempt
summary: Revert a specific node to a prior attempt by restoring filesystem state and resetting dependent nodes.

name: Retry a task within a run
summary: Reset a node to pending state and optionally reset all dependent downstream nodes, then resume the run.

name: View execution timeline
summary: Display all frames and fork branches for a run, with optional recursive tree view of descendants.

name: Diff snapshots between frames
summary: Compute structured diff of nodes, outputs, loops, and input changes between two snapshots.

name: Capture workflow snapshot
summary: Capture durable snapshot of nodes, outputs, inputs, and loops at each execution frame for time-travel.

name: Load snapshot by frame
summary: Retrieve a serialized snapshot for a specific frame or the latest frame of a run.

name: Fork operation with branch metadata
summary: Programmatic fork: creates child run from snapshot with branch label, input overrides, and node resets.

name: Replay operation with VCS restore
summary: Programmatic replay: fork a snapshot and optionally restore VCS working copy to original revision.

name: Jump to frame (rewind)
summary: Core rewind mechanism: validates runId/frameNo, acquires lock, reverts VCS sandboxes, deletes future frames and attempts.

name: Revert to node attempt
summary: Restore workspace to a specific node attempt's filesystem state via jj and discard frames after it.

name: Full time-travel with reset
summary: High-level time-travel: revert attempt, reset nodes, and optionally restore VCS to specific revision.

name: Retry task operation
summary: Reset node and dependents to pending, cancel in-flight attempts, clear outputs, and resume run.

name: Branch metadata record
summary: Records parentRunId, parentFrameNo, branch label, and fork description for a forked run.

name: Timeline frames and tree
summary: BuildTimeline returns flat list of frames with fork points; buildTimelineTree returns recursive tree of run and descendants.

name: Structured snapshot diff
summary: SnapshotDiff captures added/removed/changed nodes, outputs, loops, input changes, and VCS pointer changes.

name: Rewind concurrency lock
summary: Mutual exclusion lock preventing concurrent rewinds on the same run.

name: Rewind rate limiter
summary: Rate limit enforcement: default 10 rewinds per hour per caller, configurable window.

name: Rewind audit trail
summary: Persistent audit log of all rewind operations with status (success/failed/partial/in_progress).

name: VCS-tagged snapshot
summary: Tag a snapshot with its VCS revision and enable reverting to that exact version.

name: Fact storage (working memory)
summary: Namespace-scoped JSON fact storage with optional TTL, supporting get/set/delete/list operations across workflow, agent, user, and global scopes.

name: Message history (threads)
summary: Ordered message threads per namespace supporting saveMessage, listMessages, countMessages, and thread lifecycle operations.

name: Memory namespaces
summary: Four namespace kinds (workflow, agent, user, global) provide isolated scopes for facts and threads, matching lifetime semantics.

name: Task memory recall metadata
summary: Optional task metadata for semantic recall: namespace, topK, and query fields to inject relevant past facts into prompts.

name: Task memory persist metadata
summary: Optional task metadata to persist task output as a fact: namespace and key fields store result in working memory across runs.

name: Task message history metadata
summary: Optional task metadata to append agent conversation messages to a named thread for cross-run history.

name: TTL garbage collector processor
summary: Memory maintenance processor that deletes facts past their TTL expiration, run periodically to clean up ephemeral working memory.

name: Token limiter processor
summary: Memory maintenance processor that trims message history to stay under token budget, operates at thread level.

name: Summarizer processor
summary: Memory maintenance processor that compresses old messages into summaries using an LLM agent, operates at thread level.

name: Memory store direct API
summary: Synchronous memory store with methods for fact, thread, and message operations: getFact, setFact, deleteFact, listFacts, createThread, saveMessage, listMessages, deleteExpiredFacts.

name: Memory service (Effect)
summary: Effect-ts service layer providing memory operations as effects: getFact, setFact, listFacts, createThread, saveMessage, countMessages.

name: Namespace string parsing
summary: Utility functions to convert between MemoryNamespace objects and string representations with encoding (kind:id format).

name: Memory CLI listing
summary: CLI command to inspect facts in a namespace for debugging and observability.

name: Memory metrics
summary: Observability metrics: memoryFactReads, memoryFactWrites, memoryRecallQueries, memoryMessageSaves, memoryRecallDuration.

name: Memory schema (Drizzle tables)
summary: SQLite schema tables for persistent storage: smithersMemoryFacts, smithersMemoryThreads, smithersMemoryMessages.

name: Gateway RPC methods
keyApi: launchRun, resumeRun, cancelRun, hijackRun, rewindRun, submitApproval, submitSignal, getRun, listRuns, listWorkflows, listApprovals, streamRunEvents, streamDevTools, getNodeOutput, getNodeDiff, cronList, cronCreate, cronDelete, cronRun
summary: 19 typed RPC methods over HTTP+WebSocket for run lifecycle, approvals, signals, cron, and devtools, with stable error codes and auth scopes.

name: Gateway client SDK (TypeScript/JavaScript)
summary: Browser-first SDK for programmatic gateway RPC calls, event streaming with resilient reconnection/backoff, and WebSocket multiplexing.

name: Gateway React hooks
keyApi: useGatewayRun, useGatewayRuns, useGatewayRpc, useGatewayRunEvents, useGatewayApprovals, useGatewayActions, useGatewayExtensionStream, useGatewayExtensionResource, useGatewayExtensionAction, createGatewayReactRoot, SmithersGatewayProvider
summary: React 19 hooks for live-data subscriptions over gateway collections with stale-data guards, optimistic mutations, and WebSocket reconnect handling.

name: Declarative sync collections (TanStack DB)
keyApi: useSyncQuery, useSyncMutation, useSyncSubscription, createGatewayCollections, SyncProvider, createSmithersGatewayTransport
summary: TanStack DB-backed declarative query/mutation/subscription API for runs, workflows, approvals, and events with multiplexing and GC.

name: Gateway extension RPC/stream system
summary: Third-party RPC methods and streams over the gateway namespace/key pattern with backpressure, bounded frame windows, and reconnect resume.

name: Gateway auth scopes and tokens
keyApi: run:read, run:write, run:admin, approval:submit, signal:submit, cron:read, cron:write, observability:read, *, methodName
summary: Granular auth scopes for gateway RPC methods; tokens grant scopes and caller identity (userId, role) for ownership and audit.

name: Gateway UI boot configuration
summary: Global config passed to custom UIs at boot time: base URL, auth token, run ID, and protocol version via window.__SMITHERS_GATEWAY_UI__.

name: Gateway RPC error codes
keyApi: InvalidRequest, InvalidInput, Unauthorized, Forbidden, RunNotFound, RUN_NOT_ACTIVE, CronNotFound, NodeNotFound, FrameOutOfRange, SeqOutOfRange, Busy, AlreadyDecided, RateLimited, PayloadTooLarge, BackpressureDisconnect, UnsupportedSandbox, VcsError, RewindFailed, Internal
summary: 21 stable error codes with HTTP status mappings and optional requiredScope/refresh hints for auth token expiry handling.

name: Smithers observability service layer
summary: Effect-based service for OpenTelemetry integration: span context, tracing, logging format (json/pretty/logfmt), and log-level configuration.

name: Smithers metrics system (Prometheus/OTLP)
summary: In-process metrics registry with 100+ Prometheus counters/gauges/histograms for runs, nodes, timers, tokens, sandbox, DB, and networking.

name: Metric definitions catalog
summary: Typed metric registry: counter/gauge/histogram with unit, labels, boundaries; label cardinality safeguards and overflow protection.

name: Correlation context (distributed tracing)
summary: Fiber-local correlation context for tracing: userId, runId, traceId propagation across Effect tasks.

name: Structured logging API
keyApi: logDebug, logInfo, logWarning, logError, SmithersEvent, SmithersLogFormat
summary: Structured event logging with configurable format (JSON, pretty, logfmt, string) and log level filtering.

name: DevTools snapshot/delta stream
summary: Versioned (v1) WebSocket stream of workflow tree snapshots and incremental deltas for inspector/debugger consumption.

name: Run events resilient stream
summary: WebSocket stream with gap-resync semantics, bounded replay, per-run sequence numbers, and heartbeat keep-alives.

name: Serve mode (single-workflow HTTP server)
summary: Hono-based HTTP server for a single workflow: REST routes, SSE events, approvals, metrics, and health endpoint.

name: Gateway server (multi-workflow)
summary: Multi-workflow headless control plane with WebSocket RPC, event subscriptions, UI mounting, cron scheduling, and auth.

name: HTTP server (REST multi-workflow)
summary: Node.js http-based multi-workflow REST server with bearer auth, SSE events, approval submission, and Prometheus metrics.

name: Gateway WebSocket protocol
keyApi: req, res, event, connect.challenge, hello, tick, run.completed, approval.requested, devtools.event
summary: Frame-based protocol: request/response with correlation IDs, server-pushed events, handshake with auth challenge, and heartbeat.

name: Custom UI pattern (vanilla/React)
keyApi: gateway.register(key, workflow, { ui: { entry, title } }), createGatewayReactRoot
summary: Mount custom UIs per workflow via .ui/<key>.tsx or vanilla JS entry points; UIs bootstrap with gateway boot config.

name: Rewind run (time travel)
summary: Destructive frame rewind with VCS sandbox rollback, audit trail, owner/admin authorization, and 10-rewind-per-hour quota.

name: Gateway exponential backoff
summary: Configurable exponential backoff with jitter for stream reconnection and RPC retry.

name: Node output and diff fetching
summary: Fetch task output payload with schema descriptor or node-level diff bundle (VCS, file-level changes).

name: <Worktree>
summary: React component that runs a subtree in an isolated git or jj worktree rooted at a filesystem path.

name: <MergeQueue>
summary: React component that queues child tasks to run with bounded concurrency (default 1), providing merge-queue serialization.

name: <Sandbox>
summary: React component that executes a child workflow through an injectable sandbox provider with optional networking, volume mounts, custom images, and egress config.
keyApi: <Sandbox id={string} provider? runtime? workflow? input? output>

name: SandboxProvider
summary: Pluggable interface for sandbox execution: {id, run(request), cleanup?(request)} for local/remote VM/Docker/Freestyle implementations.

name: SandboxRuntime
summary: Process isolation runtime for sandboxes: bubblewrap (Linux), docker (OCI containers), or codeplane (cloud VMs).

name: Sandbox Network
summary: Network access control for sandboxes via allowNetwork prop; denied by default, enabled per-sandbox.

name: Sandbox Volume Mounts
summary: Host directory binding into sandbox containers via volumes prop with {host, container, readonly?} specifications.

name: Sandbox Egress Config
summary: HTTP/HTTPS proxy, CA certificates, and secret bindings for sandbox outbound connections.

name: Sandbox Workspace Spec
summary: jj workspace configuration inside a sandbox with name, snapshot restoration, idle timeout, and persistence mode.

name: Sandbox Diff Review
summary: Human-in-the-loop review and auto-acceptance of file changes produced by sandbox execution.

name: findVcsRoot()
summary: Detect the nearest .jj or .git directory, preferring jj for colocated repos, returning {type, root} or null.

name: runJj()
summary: Execute an arbitrary jj command and capture {code, stdout, stderr}; safe to call when jj is missing.

name: Jj Pointer
summary: A jj change_id that identifies a stable point in worktree history for durable restore and cache invalidation.

name: revertToJjPointer()
summary: Restore a worktree's working copy to a previously recorded jj change_id using 'jj restore --from <pointer>'.

name: workspaceAdd()
summary: Create a new jj workspace at a filesystem path with a friendly name, optionally at a specific revision.

name: workspaceList()
summary: List existing jj workspaces in a repo with structured output, falling back to parsing if -T template is unavailable.

name: workspaceClose()
summary: Close a jj workspace by name, cleaning up associated metadata and directories.

name: isJjRepo()
summary: Detect whether a directory is a readable jj repository via 'jj --version' execution.

name: captureWorkspaceSnapshot()
summary: Capture a worktree's current state as {commitId, changeId, operationId} for time-travel and durability.

name: Binary Resolution
summary: Executable discovery for jj and git: env override (SMITHERS_JJ_PATH/SMITHERS_GIT_PATH), bundled packages, then PATH.

name: vcsToolingStatus()
summary: Synchronous best-effort probe for usable jj and/or git executables, returning {jj, git, ok}.

name: jj Snapshot Behavior
summary: jj continuously snapshots working-copy edits onto its bookmark; dirty-state detection via git status appears clean; instead use jj diff or git diff against baseBranch.

name: Worktree Path Access
summary: Read the resolved absolute worktree path in a task using ctx.worktreePath(taskId) or ctx.resolveWorktreePath(pathProp).

name: Worktree + MergeQueue Pattern
summary: Fan-out work across multiple isolated worktrees, each with sequential build/test/apply steps in MergeQueue, enabling per-worktree parallelism with bounded merges.

name: SandboxProvider Interface
summary: Contract for sandbox implementations: {id, run(request), cleanup?(request)} where run receives request with rootDir/workflow/input and returns {bundlePath} or {status, output, diffBundle, patches}.

name: Freestyle Sandbox Adapter
summary: Pluggable provider adapter that creates Freestyle VMs, writes request/setup files, execs commands, reads result JSON, enabling real VMs as sandboxes.

name: Supervisor Per-Agent Worktrees
summary: When useWorktrees={true}, Supervisor places each worker in .worktrees/{prefix}-worker-{type} on branch worker/{prefix}-worker-{type} for isolated parallel work.

name: createOpenApiTools (async)
summary: Async function that parses an OpenAPI spec and returns a record of AI SDK tools keyed by operationId.

name: createOpenApiToolsSync (sync)
summary: Synchronous variant of createOpenApiTools that works with local files and spec objects (not URLs).

name: createOpenApiTool (async)
summary: Async function to create a single AI SDK tool for a specific operationId from an OpenAPI spec.

name: createOpenApiToolSync (sync)
summary: Synchronous variant to create a single tool for a specific operationId (local files and objects only).

name: listOperations
summary: List all operationIds and their metadata (method, path, summary) from an OpenAPI spec without creating tools.

name: smithers openapi list CLI command
summary: CLI command to preview tools that would be generated from an OpenAPI spec, listing each operationId with method, path, and summary.

name: Bearer token authentication
summary: Pass auth option { type: 'bearer', token: string } to add Authorization: Bearer header to all tool requests.

name: Basic authentication
summary: Pass auth option { type: 'basic', username, password } to add Authorization: Basic header (base64 encoded) to all tool requests.

name: API key authentication
summary: Pass auth option { type: 'apiKey', name, value, in: 'header'|'query' } to add API key as header or query parameter to all tool requests.

name: Base URL override
summary: Pass baseUrl option to override the spec's default server URL for all tool requests.

name: Custom request headers
summary: Pass headers option as Record<string, string> to add custom headers merged into every tool request.

name: Operation filtering (include/exclude)
summary: Pass include/exclude arrays of operationIds to allowlist or blocklist specific operations; exclude wins if both are set.

name: Tool name prefix
summary: Pass namePrefix option to prepend a prefix to generated tool names without changing the operationIds used for filtering.

name: Load spec from local file
summary: Pass a local file path (string) to createOpenApiTools/loadSpec functions to read and parse a YAML or JSON OpenAPI spec.

name: Load spec from URL
summary: Pass a URL (http:// or https://) to createOpenApiTools/loadSpecEffect to fetch and parse a remote OpenAPI spec.

name: Load spec from raw text
summary: Pass a raw JSON or YAML text string to createOpenApiTools/loadSpec functions; auto-detects format and parses without filesystem access.

name: Load spec from object
summary: Pass a parsed OpenAPI spec object directly to createOpenApiTools; skips parsing and uses it immediately.

name: JSON Schema to Zod conversion
summary: Exported jsonSchemaToZod(schema, spec) converts OpenAPI JSON Schema objects to Zod schemas, supporting allOf/anyOf/oneOf, nullable fields, defaults, and constraints.

name: Build combined operation schema
summary: Exported buildOperationSchema(parameters, requestBody, spec) combines path/query/header parameters and request body into a single Zod schema for an operation.

name: Extract operations from spec
summary: Exported extractOperations(spec) parses an OpenAPI spec and returns ParsedOperation[] with operationId, method, path, parameters, and requestBody.

name: Load spec with Effect
summary: Exported loadSpecEffect(input) returns Effect.Effect<OpenApiSpec> that loads a spec from file, URL, or text with async/error handling.

name: Load spec synchronously
summary: Exported loadSpecSync(input) synchronously loads a spec from a local file path or object; does not fetch URLs.

name: OpenAPI tool metrics
summary: Exported Effect metrics: openApiToolCallsTotal (counter), openApiToolCallErrorsTotal (counter), openApiToolDuration (histogram) for observability.

name: bash tool
summary: Built-in Smithers tool to run shell commands with cmd, optional args array, and optional cwd; enforces network/path containment.

name: read tool
summary: Built-in Smithers tool to read file contents; enforces path containment within --root.

name: write tool
summary: Built-in Smithers tool to write or overwrite file contents; enforces path containment within --root.

name: edit tool
summary: Built-in Smithers tool to apply unified diff patches to files; enforces path containment within --root.

name: grep tool
summary: Built-in Smithers tool to search files with regex patterns using ripgrep (rg); enforces path containment within --root.

name: Path containment enforcement
summary: All file-accessing tools enforce --root containment: paths are validated against rootDir, symlink targets are checked, and escape attempts throw TOOL_PATH_ESCAPE error.

name: getToolContext()
summary: Get the ambient AsyncLocalStorage-based tool execution context (run/node/cwd/auth/limits) set by runWithToolContext().

name: runWithToolContext()
summary: Set the ambient tool execution context via AsyncLocalStorage so tool execute() functions can access run/node/idempotency context across awaits.

name: getToolIdempotencyKey()
summary: Generate or return an idempotency key for tool requests from context: 'smithers:<runId>:<nodeId>:<iteration>' or custom idempotencyKey field.

name: nextToolSeq()
summary: Increment and return a sequence counter in the tool context for ordering or versioning tool calls within a run/node.

name: MCP Server via CLI
summary: Start Smithers as a Model Context Protocol stdio server with --mcp flag for AI agent control.

name: MCP Semantic Tools
summary: Stable structured tool set for MCP clients including list_workflows, run_workflow, watch_run, resolve_approval, ask_human, and more.

name: Workflow Skills Generation
summary: Generate agent-facing skill documentation files for local workflows via smithers workflow skills.

name: Cron Schedule Management
summary: Register, list, and manage background cron schedules for workflow automation via smithers cron commands.

name: Ask Human Blocking Request
summary: Raise a blocking human-approval request from inside a running workflow and wait for the decision.

name: Human Request Inbox Management
summary: List, answer, and cancel durable human requests via smithers human inbox|answer|cancel.

name: Hijack Agent Session
summary: Hand off the latest resumable agent session or conversation for a run to native CLI.
docPointer: apps/cli/src/index.js: lines 3824-3972; docs/llms-integrations.txt: Hijack handoff section

name: Supervisor Watch Loop
summary: Watch for stale running runs and auto-resume them in background with configurable thresholds.

name: Signal Delivery to Runs
summary: Deliver a durable named signal to a run waiting on Signal or WaitForEvent components.

name: Gateway Cron RPC Methods
summary: RPC methods cronList, cronCreate, cronDelete, cronRun for programmatic cron management via Gateway.

name: MCP List Workflows Tool
summary: Discover and list all Smithers workflows available in working directory via MCP list_workflows tool.

name: MCP Run Workflow Tool
summary: Start or resume a discovered workflow via MCP run_workflow tool with input, runId, and run options.

name: MCP Watch Run Tool
summary: Poll a run at fixed interval until terminal state with timeout support via MCP watch_run tool.

name: MCP Explain Run Tool
summary: Return structured diagnosis explaining why a run is blocked, waiting, or stale via MCP explain_run.

name: MCP Resolve Approval Tool
summary: Approve or deny a pending human approval gate via MCP resolve_approval tool.

name: MCP Revert Attempt Tool
summary: Revert workspace and frame history back to a specific attempt state (destructive) via MCP revert_attempt.

name: MCP Get Node Detail Tool
summary: Get enriched detail for a single node including attempts, tool calls, token usage, and scorer results.

name: MCP List Pending Approvals Tool
summary: List human approvals waiting for decision, optionally filtered by run, workflow, or node.

name: MCP Ask Human Tool
summary: Block current run and ask human to make decision, wait for answer via MCP ask_human tool.

name: Smithers as MCP Client
summary: Use Smithers as a client to external MCP servers via createMcpToolset for SDK agents.

name: Native Agent Hijack Engines
summary: Support for hijacking sessions across multiple agent CLIs: Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity, Gemini, Pi, Kimi, Forge, Amp.

name: Render-Execute-Persist Loop
summary: The fundamental cycle that powers Smithers: render the workflow tree, extract ready tasks, execute them, persist outputs to SQLite, and re-render against the new state.

name: Frame as Unit of Progress
summary: Every frame is a snapshot of (state → plan); frames are the unit for time travel, observability, hot reload, and resume.

name: ctx.output() and ctx.outputMaybe()
summary: Two methods to read upstream task outputs: ctx.output() throws if missing (for guaranteed deps), ctx.outputMaybe() returns undefined (for conditional rendering).

name: ctx.outputs() for All Rows
summary: Returns all rows from an output table or accesses rows by schema key as ctx.outputs.keyName.

name: ctx.latest() for Loop Iteration
summary: Reads the highest-iteration output of a task, used inside Loop to read the previous iteration's output.

name: ctx.latestArray() for Parsed Arrays
summary: Parses a JSON string, scalar, or array and keeps entries accepted by a Zod schema, handling null coalescing.

name: Crash-Resume Durability Contract
summary: A completed task is never re-executed. Resume loads persisted state, validates workflow source hash and VCS revision, abandons stale in-progress attempts (>15 min without heartbeat), and continues.

name: Heartbeat Timeout Recovery
summary: In-progress tasks without a heartbeat for >15 minutes are abandoned on resume as stale and re-executed as a fresh attempt.

name: Hot Reload Mode
summary: Edit workflow code during a running execution; changes apply only to newly scheduled tasks while in-flight tasks finish on their original code.

name: Stable Task ID Requirement
summary: Task IDs must be stable and data-derived across renders. Changing an ID makes it look like a new task; a disappeared ID drops the old task from the plan.
keyApi: id prop on Task, Loop, Branch

name: Aspects Token Budget
summary: Limit total token usage across a workflow subtree with per-task and global limits; enforce with fail/warn/skip-remaining on breach.

name: Aspects Latency SLO
summary: Limit wall-clock latency for workflow execution; enforce with fail/warn on breach.

name: Aspects Budget Inheritance
summary: Nested Aspects inherit outer budget configs wholesale; a child's config field replaces the parent's entire field (no per-field merge).

name: SmithersEvent Union Type
summary: Tagged union of all runtime events: SupervisorStarted, RunStarted, NodePending, NodeStarted, TaskHeartbeat, TaskHeartbeatTimeout, NodeFinished, NodeFailed, ApprovalRequested, etc.

name: EngineDecision Union Type
summary: Tagged union of scheduler decisions: Execute (run tasks), ReRender (render with new context), Wait (pause for event), ContinueAsNew (close and restart), Finished, Failed.

name: Loop Control Flow
summary: Re-run children repeatedly: on each iteration, render, execute, persist outputs; check until condition on next frame; stop when until is true or maxIterations is reached.

name: Branch Conditional Rendering
summary: Conditional fork: mounts then when if is true, otherwise else. Unselected branch tasks are absent from the task graph.

name: Parallel Concurrency Control
summary: Run children concurrently with optional maxConcurrency cap. Completes when all children finish unless continueOnFail is set on individual tasks.

name: Fork Immutable Session Copy
summary: Copy another agent task's final session context into a fresh, independent session and submit a new prompt. Source is never mutated; multiple tasks can safely fork the same source.

name: Continue As New State Transition
summary: Close the current run and start a fresh one with optional JSON-serializable carried state. Workflow id is preserved; run id increments.

name: Render Context (ctx)
summary: The only interface between workflow code and runtime; provides runId, iteration, iterations, input, outputs, auth, task states.

name: Task State Machine
summary: Task states: pending, waiting-approval, waiting-event, waiting-timer, in-progress, finished, failed, cancelled, skipped. Transitions driven by task completion, approval, timeout, or scheduler decisions.

name: Input Immutability
summary: ctx.input is immutable and persisted at first run. Resuming with different --input is an error.

name: Saga Compensation Pattern
summary: Forward steps run sequentially, each with a compensation. On failure of any step, compensations run in reverse from the failed step.

name: Agent Output Validation Retries
summary: Agent output validation failures trigger retry attempts; agents self-correct on schema drift without consuming manual retry budget.

name: Task Caching with Auto-Invalidation
summary: Per-task caching with cache key = cache.by(ctx) + cache.version + schema signature (SHA-256). Schema changes auto-invalidate; use for pure work only.

name: Task Dependencies: deps and needs
summary: deps declares typed render-time upstream outputs; needs maps local names to upstream task ids. Use needs when dep name differs from upstream id.

name: Pure Function Render Model
summary: Render function is a pure function of ctx (which reads SQLite). Plan is derived from persisted state; no mutation, no refs, no useState for durable values.

name: Approval Gate vs Decision Node
summary: needsApproval on Task is a gate (pause, no decision data). Approval is a decision node (produces typed ApprovalDecision row for branching).

name: Approval Denial Policies
summary: Three policies for denied approval: fail (abort run), continue (proceed without gated branch), skip (skip gated tasks, continue siblings).

name: Idempotency Key for Side-Effect Tools
summary: Mark tools with sideEffect: true and use ctx.idempotencyKey so retries don't double-fire the same operation.

name: Graph Snapshot Extraction
summary: Runtime walks the rendered JSX tree to produce a GraphSnapshot: flat list of TaskDescriptors capturing node id, dependencies, output schema, agent, retries, timeouts.

name: Scheduler Service
summary: Computes the ready set from the plan: tasks whose dependencies completed, whose enclosing sequence reached them, whose enclosing branch resolved them, and which fit within maxConcurrency.

name: Workflow Session Service
summary: Effect-based service that orchestrates task lifecycle: submitGraph, taskCompleted, taskFailed, approvalResolved, eventReceived, signalReceived, hotReloaded, etc.

name: Smithers Init Command
summary: Scaffold .smithers/ with seeded workflows, prompts, components, agent configs, and optional dependencies.

name: Init Templates (Starters)
summary: Pre-built starter templates for common workflows (idea-to-prd, idea-to-tickets, research, debug, etc.).

name: Starters Browsing Command
summary: Browse and filter available starter templates by audience, goal, workflow, or tag.

name: Workflow Run Command
summary: Execute a discovered workflow by ID with input, concurrency control, resumption, and HTTP serving.

name: Workflow Create Scaffold Command
summary: Create a new minimal flat workflow scaffold in .smithers/workflows/ with TypeScript and JSX setup.

name: Create Workflow (Seeded Workflow)
summary: Guided agent-driven workflow authoring: clarify intent → provision docs/skills → design → approve → scaffold → verify → document.

name: Create Skill (Seeded Workflow)
summary: Guided agent-driven skill authoring: clarify capability → design doc structure → scaffold SKILL.md → verify → document.

name: JSX Workflow Authoring API
summary: Author workflows as JSX trees with Workflow, Task, Sequence, Parallel, Branch, Loop, and control-flow components.

name: Seeded Workflow Pack
summary: 61 pre-built workflow templates covering research, planning, review, approval, monitoring, and multi-agent patterns.

name: Example Workflow Patterns
summary: 100 documented example workflows demonstrating patterns: fan-out-fan-in, loops, debates, panels, triage, migrations, PR lifecycles, and more.

name: Workflow Graph Rendering
summary: Render the workflow graph without executing it to verify structure and detect syntax errors.

name: Workflow Inspection Command
summary: Show workflow metadata, input/output schemas, and agent-facing skill documentation.

name: Workflow Skills Generation
summary: Generate SKILL.md documentation for discovered workflows for agent use.

name: MDX Prompt Templates
summary: Author prompts as .mdx files with JSX interpolation for variables, enabling dynamic prompt composition.

name: Task Component
summary: JSX component for declaring a unit of work with agent, output schema, prompt, and dependencies.

name: Sequence Component
summary: JSX component for sequential task execution where later tasks depend on earlier outputs.

name: Parallel Component
summary: JSX component for concurrent independent task execution with optional concurrency limit.

name: Loop Component
summary: JSX component for iterating tasks until a condition is satisfied or max iterations reached.

name: Branch Component
summary: JSX component for conditional execution: if condition then branch1 else branch2.

name: Approval Component
summary: JSX component for pausing execution to request human approval with optional feedback.

name: Workflow List Discovery
summary: List all discovered workflows from local .smithers/workflows/ and global ~/.smithers/workflows/.

name: Starter Templates Reference
summary: 10 canonical starter template IDs with audiences and corresponding seeded workflows (idea-to-prd, idea-to-tickets, launch-checklist, etc.).

name: Workflow Agent Configuration
summary: Assign agents to tasks; agents are configured in .smithers/agents/ (smart, smartTool, cheapFast, etc.) and can be any provider.

name: Workflow Up Command
summary: Start or resume a workflow execution with input, run ID, resource limits, and optional HTTP serving.

name: Force Init Flag
summary: Overwrite existing .smithers/ scaffold files during init.

name: Global Init Flag
summary: Scaffold the workflow pack in ~/.smithers (global) instead of ./.smithers (local).

name: Agents-Only Init Flag
summary: Only create .smithers/agents/ configuration without touching the workflow pack.

name: Fan-Out-Fan-In Pattern
summary: Split work into N parallel items, process each independently, merge results.

name: Loop/Coverage Pattern
summary: Iterate until convergence: measure → improve → repeat with measurable progress.

name: Debate/Panel Pattern
summary: Multiple agents argue positions in parallel, a judge synthesizes the verdict.

name: Triage/Classifier Pattern
summary: Classify/categorize items, route each to handler by classification.

name: Waterfall/Sequence Pattern
summary: Sequential phases where each phase receives and builds on previous phase output.

name: Review Loop Pattern
summary: Agent implements, reviewer critiques, implementer fixes, repeat until approved.

name: Example Kit Utilities
summary: Helper functions and utilities for writing example workflows: createExampleSmithers, latest, unique, countBy, etc.

name: Seeded Reusable Components
summary: Pre-built TSX components for common subflows: ValidationLoop, Review, GrillMe, FeatureEnum, ShipTickets.
